description.value:
Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 5

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As To-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the View Gate, improving the bonuses to +8 Strength and Dexterity, +30 ft land speed, and the temporary Chakra gained increases to 20. You also gain 3 temporary Chakra each round, but the bonuses to Initiative or skill checks from To-Mon Kai are not applied. The damage you take increases to 7 damage per round. When the View Gate closes, make a Fortitude save (DC 28). If you succeed, you are exhausted until the end of the encounter. Otherwise, your HP is reduced to 0 and you are exhausted until you rest for 8 hours.

If the Gate was open for more than 1 round, you take a cumulative -6 penalty to all ability scores for 24 hours after the Gate closes, and you take 50% increased damage from all sources for 1 minute after it closes.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 6 per round, reduces the penalty to ability scores to -2 (still cumulative), and you will not suffer extra damage once the Gate closes.
